nodes.label: LLM Wiki
nodes.rationale: Local-first research wiki: sources in raw/, knowledge materialized as markdown pages under wiki/, Ingest turns one source into many updated pages.

nodes.label: Wiki ontology
nodes.rationale: Machine-readable page-type contract at .llm-wiki/ontology.json; schema.md is human/LLM view generated at project creation; canonical source for write-time validation.

nodes.label: Machine ontology canonical contract
nodes.rationale: .llm-wiki/ontology.json is canonical; schema.md is generated at project creation and not overwritten on bootstrap; schema.md may hold prose ontology does not encode in v1.

nodes.label: Write-time validation
nodes.rationale: Hard contract blocks one page write and queues Review; soft contract allows write plus Review; block never aborts entire Ingest run.

nodes.label: Knowledge graph (wiki UI)
nodes.rationale: Visualizes resolved page references between pages; not a separate link type per syntax (Related vs Wikilink).

nodes.label: Source File Watch and Ingest Queue
nodes.norm_label: source file watch and ingest queue

nodes.label: API server real HTTP test suite
nodes.norm_label: api server real http test suite

nodes.label: Two-stage delete confirmation
nodes.rationale: Delete actions require a first click to arm and a second click within 5s to confirm, with pending state lifted to SourcesView so only one tree node is armed at a time.

nodes.label: Entities manifest first in analysis output
nodes.rationale: Analysis LLM responses place a machine-readable <entities> JSON block before prose so token caps truncate analysis text rather than the entity manifest required for batched wiki generation.
nodes.norm_label: entities manifest first in analysis output

nodes.label: Wiki catalog index seam
nodes.rationale: Single mutation API for wiki/index.md: reconcile adds missing lines only; remove drops deleted pages; replace is wholesale LLM/manual save; append inserts one line under a section.

nodes.label: Dedup three-stage pipeline
nodes.rationale: Stage 1 extracts entity summaries without LLM; stage 2 LLM detects duplicate slug groups; stage 3 merges bodies, unions frontmatter, rewrites wikilinks and index.md.

nodes.label: Dedup serial merge queue
nodes.rationale: Persistent serial queue prevents concurrent merges racing on cross-reference rewrites; mirrors ingest-queue lifecycle with pause/restore and up to 3 retries.

nodes.label: CLI subprocess LLM transport
nodes.rationale: Tauri spawns claude/codex CLI, streams JSON/JSONL stdout as events; TypeScript parsers normalize tokens into StreamCallbacks shared with HTTP chat.

nodes.label: Chat context budget allocation
nodes.rationale: Splits maxContextSize into index (~5%), pages (~50%), and response reserve (~15%); per-page cap scales with budget instead of a fixed 30K ceiling.

nodes.label: Unicode script language detection
nodes.rationale: Heuristic detector for 20+ languages via script ranges, Japanese-vs-Chinese disambiguation, and Persian-vs-Arabic orthographic cues.

nodes.label: Deep research task pipeline
nodes.rationale: Queues web search, LLM synthesis with wiki cross-links, governed wiki write, then auto-ingest to materialize entities and graph edges.

nodes.label: Azure OpenAI endpoint URL shapes
nodes.rationale: Normalizes pasted Azure resource URLs (bare host, deployment path, full chat URL) into resourceBase, deployment, and api-version for chat/completions calls.

nodes.label: Offline bilingual user changelog
nodes.rationale: Hardcoded versioned highlights (en/zh) in Settings instead of GitHub Releases so release notes work offline and ship with the app.

nodes.label: Embedding RAG quality gate tests
nodes.rationale: RUN_LLM_TESTS suite validates real endpoint vectors, semantic ranking, oversize halving over TCP, and multi-page chunking—bugs mocks cannot catch.

nodes.label: Codex prompt synthetic tag escaping
nodes.rationale: User content that mimics </USER> or <SYSTEM> role delimiters is HTML-escaped so injected tags cannot break the reconstructed stdin prompt.

nodes.label: Clip server polling auto-ingest
nodes.rationale: Polls localhost:19827 for pending web clips and enqueues ingest (not direct autoIngest) so tasks appear in the activity panel and survive refresh.

nodes.label: Dedup not-duplicates whitelist
nodes.rationale: Persists user-confirmed false-positive duplicate groups to .llm-wiki/dedup-not-duplicates.json so future detector runs skip them.

nodes.label: Embedding auto-halve retry
nodes.rationale: On oversize HTTP rejections, fetchEmbedding halves input text up to maxRetries before giving up, surfacing lastEmbeddingError for Settings UI when vector search falls back to BM25.

nodes.label: Chunk-to-page search score blend
nodes.rationale: searchByEmbedding groups LanceDB chunk hits by page_id and scores each page as max(chunk_scores) plus 0.3×sum(tail), capped at 1.0−max so multi-chunk pages outrank single-chunk ties.

nodes.label: JSON wikilink substitution (enrich v2)
nodes.rationale: LLM returns only {links:[{term,target}]} JSON; applyLinks inserts [[wikilinks]] on first literal occurrence so page bytes stay identical outside brackets and models cannot rewrite body content.

nodes.label: Extract manifest SHA-256 cache
nodes.rationale: Persists SavedImage metadata under .llm-wiki keyed by source content hash; invalidated when hash changes or any listed image file is missing on disk.

nodes.label: Frontmatter wikilink-list YAML repair
nodes.rationale: repairWikilinkLists quotes comma-separated [[wikilink]] sequences so js-yaml can parse LLM-emitted related: [[a]], [[b]] lines that are invalid bare YAML.

nodes.label: Retrieval graph multi-signal relevance
nodes.rationale: calculateRelevance blends direct wikilinks, frontmatter related links, shared sources, Adamic-Adar common neighbors, and ontology type-affinity weights for chat context expansion.

nodes.label: LLM endpoint base URL normalization
nodes.rationale: Strips pasted /chat/completions or /embeddings tails and flags bare hosts missing version segments so dispatch does not double-append request paths.

nodes.label: Structural wiki graph node filter
nodes.rationale: Default hideStructural removes index, overview, log, schema, purpose nodes from graph visualization so hub pages do not dominate layout.

nodes.label: CONTEXT_CHARS window
nodes.rationale: 150-char before/after slices around each image for context-aware captions; tuned down from 500 to cut token noise.

nodes.label: FILE block ingest format
nodes.rationale: LLM emits ---FILE: wiki/...--- bodies terminated by ---END FILE---; parser must not drop blocks inside fenced code.

nodes.label: FILE block path sandbox under wiki/
nodes.rationale: LLM-emitted ---FILE: paths are validated at parse time so prompt-injected traversal (../, absolute paths, Windows reserved names) cannot escape the project wiki/ tree before writeFile runs.
nodes.norm_label: file block path sandbox under wiki/

nodes.label: Fence-aware FILE block parser
nodes.rationale: Line-based opener/closer parsing with fenced-code awareness fixes CRLF, marker variants, and false ---END FILE--- matches inside code blocks that broke the legacy regex parser.

nodes.label: Per-FILE-block output language guard
nodes.rationale: After parsing, concept pages are rejected when detectLanguage disagrees with the configured output language across script families; sources/entities pages skip the check because cross-language proper nouns are expected.

nodes.label: Provider-specific LLM wire sampling translation
nodes.rationale: RequestOverrides are translated per provider: OpenAI top-level knobs, Gemini under generationConfig with renamed keys, Anthropic stop_sequences, plus endpoint-specific strips for GPT-5/o-series and Kimi temperature restrictions.

nodes.label: Reasoning-only stream end diagnostic
nodes.rationale: streamChat tracks content vs reasoning channel bytes so models that emit chain-of-thought without delta.content surface a clear error instead of silent empty responses.

nodes.label: Local LLM Origin: http://localhost header
nodes.rationale: Ollama and other local OpenAI-compatible servers get a fixed Origin header so Tauri webview defaults and LAN endpoint URLs do not trip OLLAMA_ORIGINS CORS allowlists.

nodes.label: Wiki-root-relative markdown image paths
nodes.rationale: Generated ![](media/...) paths resolve from project/wiki/ regardless of page depth, then convertFileSrc makes them load in the Tauri webview where relative URLs have no filesystem context.

nodes.label: IME composition Enter submit guard
nodes.rationale: Combines nativeEvent.isComposing and keyCode 229 so CJK IME candidate-commit Enter does not bubble to chat submit handlers.

nodes.label: Mandatory output language directive
nodes.rationale: Explicit user outputLanguage overrides auto-detection; directives injected into LLM system prompts to force wiki content generation in the chosen language regardless of source material language.

nodes.label: ADR 0003 Tier A page-id normalization
nodes.rationale: pageId names files with hyphenated heuristic splits; dedupKey buckets orthographic duplicates by stripping all non-alphanumeric chars. Separate functions because pageId heuristic misfires only yield ugly ids while dedupKey misfires create duplicate pages.

nodes.label: Page merge three-layer protection
nodes.rationale: Layer 1: deterministic union of array frontmatter fields. Layer 2: LLM body merge with length sanity check. Layer 3: locked scalar fields (type/title/created) forced back from existing page. Fallback preserves array-merged incoming on LLM failure.

nodes.label: Page registry (ADR 0006)
nodes.rationale: Materialized index at .llm-wiki/page-registry.json as write-through cache over wiki pages for wikilink resolution and catalog lookups.

nodes.label: Manifest coverage pass
nodes.rationale: Unions ingest source provenance onto existing manifest pages and surfaces non-manifest dangling related refs as reviews. Does NOT create stub pages — missing manifest entries go to Catch-up queue per ADR 0004.

nodes.label: Post-ingest link pass
nodes.rationale: Deterministic wikilink insertion in page bodies plus write-time canonicalization of related: frontmatter slugs to existing page ids.

nodes.label: Stable project UUID identity
nodes.rationale: Queue tasks reference projects by UUID not filesystem path; global registry maps UUID to current path so moved folders do not orphan tasks.

nodes.label: Per-project ingest serialization
nodes.rationale: Concurrent autoIngest and Save-to-Wiki both read/write wiki/index.md; without serialization the second writer silently overwrites the first and drops pages from the index.

nodes.label: Tauri app-state persistence
nodes.rationale: Central plugin-store wrapper for recent projects, LLM config, output language, source watch settings, and other UI preferences persisted in app-state.json.

nodes.label: Rust proxy startup hook
nodes.rationale: ProxyConfig persisted in app-state.json; src-tauri/src/proxy.rs reads it on launch and sets HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/NO_PROXY so tauri-plugin-http reqwest routes outbound requests. Changes require app restart.

nodes.label: Wiki media slug to raw source mapping
nodes.rationale: Image URLs under wiki/media/<slug>/img-N.ext map back to raw/sources/ by matching file stem to slug; slug equals raw source basename from extraction time.
nodes.norm_label: wiki media slug to raw source mapping

nodes.label: Reasoning-only stream diagnostic
nodes.rationale: Distinguishes 0 content + 0 reasoning (network/auth) from 0 content + large reasoning (model exhausted thinking budget without final answer); streaming layer ignores reasoning fields to avoid leaking chain-of-thought.

nodes.label: Cross-project state isolation
nodes.rationale: Must be awaited when leaving or opening a project so Zustand stores and module-level caches (ingest queue, dedup queue, graph cache, file sync, scheduled import) are fully cleared before the next project loads.

nodes.label: Review title dedupe key
nodes.rationale: Strips English/Chinese review prefixes (Missing page, 缺失页面, Duplicate page, etc.), collapses whitespace, lowercases; two items with same (type, normalized title) merge rather than duplicate.

nodes.label: MD5-based scheduled import change detection
nodes.rationale: Tracks per-file MD5 in .llm-wiki/scheduled-import-db.json; changed files copy to raw/sources/scheduled-import/, preprocess, enqueue ingest; DB only updated after successful enqueue.

nodes.label: Rust backend search delegation
nodes.rationale: WebView wrapper invokes Tauri search_project command; RRF hybrid ranking lives in src-tauri/src/commands/search.rs; TS layer passes embeddingConfig and absolutizes result paths.

nodes.label: Source delete skip guard
nodes.rationale: Pure three-way branch (keep/delete/skip) extracted from sources-view to fix data-loss bug where findRelatedWikiPages loose match deleted pages whose sources list did not include the deleting source.

nodes.label: Source deletion cascade
nodes.rationale: Deleting sources removes cache, rewrites wiki frontmatter sources, cascade-deletes sole-source pages via wiki-page-delete, and appends wiki/log.md entry.

nodes.label: Frontmatter array field union on re-ingest
nodes.rationale: Re-ingesting a page without merging sources/tags/related clobbers prior frontmatter arrays; source-delete then treats the page as single-sourced and deletes content from earlier sources — silent data loss. mergeArrayFieldsIntoContent unions old disk values with LLM-emitted values before write.
nodes.norm_label: frontmatter array field union on re-ingest

nodes.label: Two-stage inline delete confirmation
nodes.rationale: Pure state machine: first click arms pendingDeletePath, second click on same node fires file or folder delete. Extracted from SourcesView so decision logic is unit-testable without React Testing Library.

nodes.label: Review queue two-stage auto-cleanup
nodes.rationale: Runs when ingest queue drains: stage 1 rule-matches missing-page and duplicate reviews against wiki index; stage 2 batches remaining items to LLM for semantic stale-review judgment.

nodes.label: Project-switch race guard during sweep
nodes.rationale: matchesCurrentProject and AbortSignal checks bail mid-sweep if user switched projects; applying an old project's wiki index to new project reviews would corrupt review-store state.

nodes.label: Tauri HTTP plugin CORS bypass
nodes.rationale: Routes user-configured third-party URLs through Rust-backed @tauri-apps/plugin-http so endpoints with incomplete CORS (MiniMax, Volcengine Ark, enterprise gateways) work in the webview. Node/vitest falls back to globalThis.fetch when window is undefined.

nodes.label: Wiki schema template presets
nodes.rationale: Five project templates (research, reading, personal, business, general) each ship schema.md content, purpose.md scaffold, and extraDirs; all share BASE_SCHEMA_TYPES, BASE_NAMING, BASE_FRONTMATTER, and contradiction-handling conventions.

nodes.label: Markdown embedding chunker contract
nodes.rationale: Deterministic recursive splitter for embedding pipelines: heading breadcrumbs, priority ladder (sections→paragraphs→lines→sentences→whitespace→hard slice), preserves fenced code blocks and tables intact, strips YAML frontmatter, merges tiny chunks, applies overlap between siblings.

nodes.label: Polite GitHub release upgrade hint
nodes.rationale: Lightweight checker hits GitHub Releases API, compares semver-ish tags, surfaces available update in Settings About without auto-install; avoids tauri-plugin-updater code-signing requirements for OSS distribution.

nodes.label: Empty-alt image embedding gap
nodes.rationale: PDF/image extraction lands figures under wiki/media with empty ![](...) alt text; text-only summarizers strip them and embeddings lack semantic signal. captionImage produces 2-4 sentence factual descriptions via vision LLM for alt text and later indexing.

nodes.label: sources-merge regression suite
nodes.rationale: Every test failure mode maps to silent data loss on next source-delete if frontmatter array merge regresses.

nodes.label: Ingest-to-sweep chained real-LLM flow
nodes.rationale: End-to-end: ingest creates missing-page review, second ingest adds concept page, sweepResolvedReviews auto-resolves stale review — exercises review queue persistence across ingests.

nodes.label: ADR 0003 Tier A content page chokepoint
nodes.rationale: Every entity/concept write passes through canonicalizeContentPage so LLM-chosen filenames normalize via pageId and frontmatter is re-serialized canonically, preventing WIKI-DUP-SLUG and WIKI-FRONTMATTER defects.
nodes.norm_label: adr 0003 tier a content page chokepoint

nodes.label: ADR 0005 dedup pass
nodes.rationale: Three-stage concept-identity check: dedupKey clustering (stage 1), vector recall (stage 2), LLM same-or-not judgement (stage 3). Only seed pages touched in an ingest run are checked.

nodes.label: ADR 0006 wiki ontology governance
nodes.rationale: Machine-readable page-type contract at .llm-wiki/ontology.json with strict/permissive validation modes, template-specific page types, and write-time schema enforcement.

nodes.label: Wiki cleanup Bug A (false negative stale refs)
nodes.rationale: Prior index cleanup used substring includes on slugs so [[KV Cache]] never matched slug kv-cache, leaving stale index entries after page deletion.
nodes.norm_label: wiki cleanup bug a (false negative stale refs)

nodes.label: Wiki cleanup Bug B (false positive collateral wipe)
nodes.rationale: Substring includes matching caused deleting ai.md to wipe [[OpenAI]], [[Constitutional AI]], and other innocent wikilinks containing the deleted slug as a fragment.
nodes.norm_label: wiki cleanup bug b (false positive collateral wipe)

nodes.label: Unicode-aware query slug policy
nodes.rationale: Save-to-Wiki filenames keep Unicode letters across scripts (CJK, Cyrillic, etc.) with NFKC normalization and UTC timestamp suffix to prevent same-day collision into -YYYY-MM-DD.md.

nodes.label: Phantom embedding hits
nodes.rationale: Orphaned LanceDB vector chunks for deleted pages waste topK search slots because searchByEmbedding returns page_id but no matching .md file exists on disk.

nodes.label: Vision real-LLM E2E probe
nodes.rationale: Skipped by fast suite; verifies OpenAI-compat vision endpoint accepts ContentBlock[] with image and streamChat SSE parser produces color-aware response.

nodes.label: Phantom embedding cleanup
nodes.rationale: Orphaned LanceDB chunks waste topK slots because search discards hits when the .md file is gone.

nodes.label: Ambiguous slug resolution policy
nodes.rationale: Suffix/prefix heuristics only resolve when unique; ambiguous shorthand stays null rather than wrong page.

nodes.label: ADR 0006 central write gate
nodes.rationale: All wiki content writes funnel through ontology validation, schema Review queueing, and page-registry upsert.

nodes.label: Wiki structural Karpathy contract
nodes.rationale: Shared index.md catalog and append-only log.md format so ingest, chat save, review, and lint speak one structure.

nodes.label: Fence-aware wikilink preview
nodes.rationale: Converts [[target]] to [label](#target) for Milkdown/ReactMarkdown while preserving wikilinks inside fenced and inline code.

nodes.label: Chat vs ingest mode
nodes.rationale: Same ChatPanel switches between freeform chat and source-targeted ingest via mode + ingestSource fields.

nodes.label: addItems (review dedupe)
nodes.rationale: Merges pending reviews by type+normalized title instead of duplicating bulk-ingest resurfaced items.

nodes.label: Update banner vs passive dots
nodes.rationale: Dismissing the banner stops interruption but settings gear dots still signal where to find the update.

nodes.label: load-test-env setup
nodes.rationale: Vitest setup file loading .env.test.local into process.env without overwriting existing vars; hand-rolled dotenv subset to avoid prod dependency.

nodes.label: MISSING_PAGE_TRIGGER
nodes.rationale: ViT doc deliberately mentions concepts not in seed wiki (layer normalization, GELU, class token) to trigger missing-page review blocks.

nodes.label: DUPLICATE_TRIGGER
nodes.rationale: Paraphrases seed wiki attention.md content; expected to emit duplicate review block.

nodes.label: CONTRADICTION_TRIGGER
nodes.rationale: Claims attention uses Gaussian kernels not softmax, contradicting seed wiki; expected contradiction review.

nodes.label: LAYER_NORM_RESOLVER
nodes.rationale: Second ingest in sweep-chained scenario that should satisfy missing-page review from missing-page-trigger-en.

nodes.label: enrichScenarios
nodes.rationale: Four scenarios testing enrichWithWikilinks JSON term→target substitution path including frontmatter preservation and CJK terms.

nodes.label: ingestScenarios
nodes.rationale: End-to-end autoIngest scenarios with two LLM stages (analysis + generation) exercising FILE and REVIEW block parsing.

nodes.label: lintScenarios
nodes.rationale: Structural lint scenarios for orphan, broken-link, no-outlinks plus semantic contradiction via mocked LINT block.

nodes.label: searchScenarios
nodes.rationale: Eight searchWiki ranking scenarios including CJK bigram, filename exact-match regression, and trailing-punct phrase bonus.

nodes.label: sweepScenarios
nodes.rationale: Twelve sweepResolvedReviews scenarios covering missing-page filename/title/Chinese prefix matching, duplicate resolution, contradiction never auto-resolving, and LLM-judged semantic match.

nodes.label: WikiProject
nodes.rationale: Stable UUID persisted at .llm-wiki/project.json survives folder moves/renames.

nodes.label: Scenario-driven test fixtures
nodes.rationale: TS source is authoritative; materialized files under tests/fixtures/scenarios/ are gitignored debug artifacts.

nodes.label: Real-LLM test content corpus
nodes.rationale: Each document designed with specific testing intent: baseline ingest, entity extraction, review triggers, multilingual, domain diversity, long-form truncation.

nodes.label: Ingest FILE and REVIEW block format
nodes.rationale: Stage 2 generation emits ---FILE: path--- and ---REVIEW: type | title--- delimited blocks; parser ignores surrounding prose.
nodes.norm_label: ingest file and review block format

nodes.label: Sweep rule vs LLM resolution
nodes.rationale: Rule stage auto-resolves missing-page by filename/title match; contradictions never auto-resolve; LLM stage returns JSON resolved IDs for semantic matches.
